title: Bellard extractor optimization + optional GPU path (verification gate unchanged)
context: bigger-pi is an open, distributed, verification-first effort to compute more digits of pi on donated compute; the public good is the open, reproducible, independently-verified toolchain, chunk-coordination protocol, and provenance ledger. This optimizes the Bellard hex extractor and adds an optional, off-by-default GPU path; correctness must not depend on the GPU and the verification gate and determinism contract must remain unchanged. It depends on core-003.
objective: Optimize the Bellard hex extractor and add an optional GPU path while leaving the verification gate and determinism contract unchanged.
acceptanceCriteria: Optimizes the Bellard hex-extractor and adds an optional GPU path that is off by default and not required for correctness.
The verification gate is unchanged and still passes; determinism and bit-reproducibility are preserved.
Documents the throughput improvement on a fixed benchmark; the PR does not merge if it breaks the determinism or verification tests; MIT-licensed.
output: A PR optimizing the Bellard extractor with an optional GPU path and an unchanged verification gate.
